inputs.label: Conduit Inner Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Internal diameter of the conduit in inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: Internal diameter of the conduit in inches.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre interne du conduit en pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro interior del conducto en pulgadas.

inputs.label: Cable Outer Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Outer diameter of a single conductor cable in inches.

businessContext_i18n.en: Outer diameter of a single conductor cable in inches.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek iletkenli kablonun dış çapı inç cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre extérieur d'un conducteur unique en pouces.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro exterior de un cable conductor individual en pulgadas.

inputs.label: Number of Conductors
inputs.businessContext: Total number of conductors to be pulled, identical size.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of conductors to be pulled, identical size.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çekilecek toplam iletken sayısı, aynı boyutta.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der zu ziehenden Leiter, gleiche Größe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de conducteurs à tirer, de taille identique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de conductores a tirar, de tamaño idéntico.

inputs.label: Custom Fill Limit (%)
inputs.businessContext: Optionally override NEC fill limit; set to 0 for automatic NEC rule.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optionally override NEC fill limit; set to 0 for automatic NEC rule.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı olarak NEC dolum limitini geçersiz kılar; otomatik NEC kuralı için 0 ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionaler Überschreibung der NEC-Füllgrenze; auf 0 setzen für automatische NEC-Regel.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnellement, remplace la limite NEC ; mettre 0 pour la règle automatique NEC.
businessContext_i18n.es: Opcionalmente anula el límite de llenado NEC; establezca en 0 para la regla NEC automática.

inputs.label: Safety Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Additional derating or future growth margin on fill percent.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional derating or future growth margin on fill percent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolum yüzdesi üzerinde ek düşürme veya gelecekteki büyüme marjı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Marge für Derating oder zukünftiges Wachstum des Füllprozentsatzes.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Déclassement supplémentaire ou marge de croissance future sur le pourcentage de remplissage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen adicional de reducción de capacidad o crecimiento futuro sobre el porcentaje de llenado.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
